'''faranga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poddar|poddar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poddar|poddar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| faranga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:færængæth|færængæth]] || [[word:færængæj|færængæj]] || [[word:færængæsh|færængæsh]] || [[word:færængæ|færængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fararangath|fararangath]] || [[word:fararangaj|fararangaj]] || [[word:fararangash|fararangash]] || [[word:fararanga|fararanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:farangath|farangath]] || [[word:farangaj|farangaj]] || [[word:farangash|farangash]] || [[word:faranga|faranga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:farafngath|farafngath]] || [[word:farafngaj|farafngaj]] || [[word:farafngash|farafngash]] || [[word:farafngaf|farafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:farangatha|farangatha]] || [[word:farangaja|farangaja]] || [[word:farangasha|farangasha]] || [[word:farangaka|farangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:farangath|farangath]] || [[word:farangaj|farangaj]] || [[word:farangash|farangash]] || [[word:faranga|faranga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:farangathal|farangathal]] || [[word:farangajal|farangajal]] || [[word:farangashal|farangashal]] || [[word:farangakal|farangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:farangathatha|farangathatha]] || [[word:farangajaja|farangajaja]] || [[word:farangashasha|farangashasha]] || [[word:farangaka|farangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:farangathan|farangathan]] || [[word:farangajan|farangajan]] || [[word:farangashan|farangashan]] || [[word:farangakan|farangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:farangathaoro|farangathaoro]] || [[word:farangajaoro|farangajaoro]] || [[word:farangashaoro|farangashaoro]] || [[word:farangakaoro|farangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
